title: Yield-aware activation of biomass porous carbon for aqueous supercapacitors
abstract: Biomass-derived porous carbon was activated with KOH to tune pore structure, BET surface area, carbon yield and capacitance under practical mass loading.

title: Lignin-cellulose derived hard carbon for sodium-ion batteries
abstract: Hard carbon prepared from cellulose and lignin precursors showed differences in d002, ID/IG, ICE and sodium storage plateau capacity.
keywords: hard carbon; sodium-ion battery; lignin; cellulose

title: Machine learning descriptors for biomass carbon electrodes
abstract: Literature-derived descriptors including BET, pore volume, carbonization temperature and heteroatom content were used to predict energy-storage performance.

title: Electrode thickness effects in porous carbon supercapacitors
abstract: The relationship between gas-accessible surface area and ion-accessible pore network was evaluated at different mass loading and electrode thickness.
keywords: pore accessibility; mass loading; electrode thickness

title: Ash removal and precursor washing in biomass hard carbon
abstract: Washing changed ash content and early-cycle sodium-ion storage behavior of biomass-derived hard carbon.
